idea.pitch: A lightweight kanban for solo makers who abandon heavyweight trackers; it turns a vague weekend idea into a single scannable board so momentum never dies between sessions.
idea.why_now: Trackers keep losing solo makers to overhead.

users.jobs: Capture an idea and see the next action without ceremony.

scope.mvp: The MVP ships a single board with drag-to-reorder cards, a one-line quick-add, and local-first persistence; it deliberately omits accounts, sharing, and any server sync in v1.

delivery.verification: npm test green; a card survives reload.
